name: Undertale/Deltarune
author: _VioMarks_, WhitetailAni
description:
Thank you Toby Fox, Temmie Chang, and the rest of the Undertale and Deltarune team for releasing this game 10 years ago. It really has changed a lot of lives past what anyone could have expected. Again, thank you.
Another very special thanks to Shayy, who supported this mod from a very early stage.
